pokemon:turtonator.name: Turtonator
pokemon:turtonator.summary: It gushes fire and poisonous gases from its nostrils. Its dung is an explosive substance and can be put to various uses.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It gushes fire and poisonous gases from its nostrils. Its dung is an explosive substance and can be put to various uses.
Eating sulfur in its volcanic habitat is what causes explosive compounds to develop in its shell. Its droppings are also dangerously explosive.
The shell on its back is chemically unstable and explodes violently if struck. The hole in its stomach is its weak point.
Explosive substances coat the shell on its back. Enemies that dare attack it will be blown away by an immense detonation.
Its exploding shell poses a real danger but is sensitive to moisture. On rainy days, Turtonator takes silent refuge in caves.
It lives in volcanoes and eats sulfur and other minerals. Materials from the food it eats form the basis of its explosive shell.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It gushes fire and poisonous gases from its nostrils. Its dung is an explosive substance and can be put to various uses.
